# Theta Seven

First mentioned: **3307-07-29**  
Last mentioned: **3307-12-31**  
Total mentions: **14**

## Related


## Biography

Theta Seven is the adopted moniker of the NMLA's principal bomb-maker and de facto military leader, originally designated prisoner number seven of the Theta Group during incarceration at Serene Harbour — an Imperial Intelligence penal facility in the R CrA Sector AF-A d42 system. After escaping alongside his fellow engineers, he adopted his prisoner designation as a political statement against the Empire's treatment of Neo-Marlinists, and his group went on to construct the caustic enzyme bombs used in the NMLA's starport terror campaign.

Theta Group was directly responsible for 17 starport bombings that killed nearly 800,000 people and injured twice as many. In November 3307, ACT captured most of Theta Group but Theta Seven remained at large, prompting an intensified manhunt and encrypted message decoding operation. His survival represented a continued existential threat to Imperial stability and a symbol of the NMLA's resilience against tri-superpower counter-terrorism efforts.
